import React from 'react'; const Contact = () => { return (
{/* Page Header */}

Contact Us

Have questions, suggestions, or need support? We're here to help.

{/* Contact Form + Info */}
{/* Contact Form */}

Send a Message

{/* Contact Info */}

Reach Us

  • 📧 Email: support@myyatraexchange.com
  • 📞 Phone: +91 12345 43210
  • 📍 Location: Indore(map), India (Remote Support Only)
  • 🕒 Support Hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Mon–Sat)
We usually respond within 24 hours. For urgent issues, please mention "URGENT" in your subject line.
); }; export default Contact;
